title: Sprinkler Truck Ambient
description: Use sprinkler-truck-style music to replace cave ambient
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/EYyD0w9ZY1k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
I've seen a lot of videos about Minecraft being a horror game, and they always mention the cave sounds.

*Oh my god, that's truly terrifying!*

So I made this sound pack, replacing all the cave sounds with sprinkler-truck-style music, inspired by the sprinkler trucks in my hometown.

Now, instead of unknown, terrifying monsters, lost miners, speeding minecarts, and digital glitches roaming around you, you'll just have the noisy sprinkler trucks passing by.
